title: Buried Artifact-Density Law — extrapolating symbolic regression over a dig grid
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training artifact density (ignores structure) -> ~0.1
linear least squares y~1+x1+x2+x3+x4: captures trend, misses the interaction/exp/quadratic curvature, extrapolates poorly onto the frontier
structured basis [1, x1, x1*x2, exp(c*x3), x4^2] with a grid search over the hidden magnetometer exp rate c, coefficients by least squares
alternatives: finer / continuous optimisation of c, ridge-regularised bases, or adding cross terms to trade the complexity penalty against held-out error
